Wuxtry Records

VINYL
Records, Compact Discs, T-shirts, Posters and more.
Buying and Selling Vinyl for 50 Years
Wuxtry Records is an independent record store established in Athens, Georgia, in 1976 by founders Dan Wall and Mark Methe. In 1978 another location was opened in Decatur, and we’ve been buying, selling, and trading records, CDs, and music memorabilia ever since. Selected by
Rolling Stone
as one of the top 25 record stores in America, we’re a user-friendly retail outlet and walk-in museum of the greatest music of the last century. Our comic book store, Bizarro-Wuxtry, is home to rare comics, unusual toys, and other novelties.
Drop by and enjoy one of Georgia’s most unique and longstanding music retail experiences.
